mapper.sql: Id, InvoiceNo, CaseNo, OrderNo, RorderNo_All, CustomerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, TransType, ImpDate, ProdCountry, OptCode, StateFlag, ExpDesc, BarCode, OrdFlag, QtyImp, OptFlag, LabelPrtFlag, AsseFlag, InvFlag, PreNo, UserName, OptTime, SmcCode, OptRecord, OrdType, unitWeight, SerialNo, pono, lineitem
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.impdata_db30
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.impdata_db30 (Id, InvoiceNo, CaseNo, OrderNo, RorderNo_All, CustomerNo, ModelNo, Quantity, TransType, ImpDate, ProdCountry, OptCode, StateFlag, ExpDesc, BarCode, OrdFlag, QtyImp, OptFlag, LabelPrtFlag, AsseFlag, InvFlag, PreNo, UserName, OptTime, SmcCode, OptRecord, OrdType, unitWeight, SerialNo, pono, lineitem) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{orderno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rordernoAll,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{prodcountry,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{stateflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{expdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{qtyimp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{optflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{labelprtflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{asseflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{invflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{preno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{smccode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{unitweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{serialno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update dbo.impdata_db30
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CaseNo = #{record.caseno,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=CHAR},
RorderNo_All = #{record.rordernoAll,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
TransType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
ImpDate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ProdCountry = #{record.prodcountry,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
ExpDesc = #{record.expdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

SmcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptRecord = #{record.optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
unitWeight = #{record.unitweight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
SerialNo = #{record.serialno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pono = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lineitem = #{record.lineitem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
